title: Miyu’s ‘Blooming Wonders’ Brings Oil Pastel Craft to Kids TV Ahead of France Télévisions Launch
summary: One does not simply craft a pastel, hand drawn TV series. Yet that is the odyssey Miyu Productions set out on with Inès Bernard-Espina, Mélody Boulissière and Clémentine Campos, the trio of directors who brought “Blooming Wonders” to life. After a 23-month journey involving more than 60 people and …

title: Alexander Kluge, New German Cinema Pioneer, Dies at 94
summary: German filmmaker Alexander Kluge, who pioneered the 1960s New German Cinema movement and won the Venice Film Festival’s Golden Lion in 1968 with “The Artists in the Big Top: Perplexed,” has died. He was 94. News of Kluge’s death was confirmed on Wednesday by his publishing company, Suhrkamp Verlag,…

title: الدفاتر القديمة.. أين ذهب "منافسو توروب" على تدريب الأهلي؟
summary: بدأت جماهير الأهلي -وربما إدارة النادي- في البحث عن مدربين محتملين لقيادة تدريب الأحمر، مستقبلًا، حال إقالة ييس توروب، المدير الفني الحالي، إن كان في الفترة الحالية، أو بعد نهاية الموسم الجاري

title: Class action alleges Nvidia hid more than $1B crypto-GPU income within its gaming revenues — investor lawsuit concerns business spanning 2017 and 2018
summary: Nvidia is back in court over whether a significant chunk of its revenue through 2017 and 2018 was reliant on the whims of the cryptocurrency market.
